NextToken.description: An opaque pagination token indicating where to continue the listing of data ingestion jobs.

DataIngestionJobSummaries.description: Specifies information about the specific data ingestion job, including dataset name and status.

JobId.description: Indicates the job ID of the data ingestion job.

DatasetName.description: The name of the dataset used for the data ingestion job.

DatasetArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the dataset used in the data ingestion job.

IngestionInputConfiguration.description: Specifies information for the input data for the data inference job, including data Amazon S3 location parameters.

S3InputConfiguration.description: The location information for the S3 bucket used for input data for the data ingestion.

Bucket.description: The name of the S3 bucket used for the input data for the data ingestion.

Prefix.description: The prefix for the S3 location being used for the input data for the data ingestion.

KeyPattern.description:
The pattern for matching the Amazon S3 files that will be used for ingestion. If the schema was created previously without any KeyPattern, then the default KeyPattern {prefix}/{component_name}/* is used to download files from Amazon S3 according to the schema. This field is required when ingestion is being done for the first time.

Valid Values: {prefix}/{component_name}_* | {prefix}/{component_name}/* | {prefix}/{component_name}[DELIMITER]* (Allowed delimiters : space, dot, underscore, hyphen)

Status.description: Indicates the status of the data ingestion job.

NextToken.description: An opaque pagination token indicating where to continue the listing of datasets.

DatasetSummaries.description: Provides information about the specified dataset, including creation time, dataset ARN, and status.

DatasetArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the specified dataset.

Status.description: Indicates the status of the dataset.

CreatedAt.description: The time at which the dataset was created in Amazon Lookout for Equipment.

NextToken.description: An opaque pagination token indicating where to continue the listing of inference schedulers.

InferenceSchedulerSummaries.description: Provides information about the specified inference scheduler, including data upload frequency, model name and ARN, and status.

ModelName.description: The name of the machine learning model used for the inference scheduler.

ModelArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the machine learning model used by the inference scheduler.

InferenceSchedulerArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the inference scheduler.

Status.description: Indicates the status of the inference scheduler.

DataDelayOffsetInMinutes.description: A period of time (in minutes) by which inference on the data is delayed after the data starts. For instance, if an offset delay time of five minutes was selected, inference will not begin on the data until the first data measurement after the five minute mark. For example, if five minutes is selected, the inference scheduler will wake up at the configured frequency with the additional five minute delay time to check the customer S3 bucket. The customer can upload data at the same frequency and they don't need to stop and restart the scheduler when uploading new data.

DataUploadFrequency.description: How often data is uploaded to the source S3 bucket for the input data. This value is the length of time between data uploads. For instance, if you select 5 minutes, Amazon Lookout for Equipment will upload the real-time data to the source bucket once every 5 minutes. This frequency also determines how often Amazon Lookout for Equipment starts a scheduled inference on your data. In this example, it starts once every 5 minutes.

LatestInferenceResult.description: Indicates whether the latest execution for the inference scheduler was Anomalous (anomalous events found) or Normal (no anomalous events found).

NextToken.description: An opaque pagination token indicating where to continue the listing of label groups.

LabelGroupSummaries.description: A summary of the label groups.

LabelGroupName.description: The name of the label group.

LabelGroupArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the label group.

CreatedAt.description: The time at which the label group was created.

UpdatedAt.description: The time at which the label group was updated.

NextToken.description: An opaque pagination token indicating where to continue the listing of machine learning models.

ModelSummaries.description: Provides information on the specified model, including created time, model and dataset ARNs, and status.

ModelName.description: The name of the machine learning model.

ModelArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the machine learning model.

DatasetName.description: The name of the dataset being used for the machine learning model.

DatasetArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the dataset used to create the model.

Status.description: Indicates the status of the machine learning model.

CreatedAt.description: The time at which the specific model was created.

ActiveModelVersion.description: The model version that the inference scheduler uses to run an inference execution.

ActiveModelVersionArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the model version that is set as active. The active model version is the model version that the inference scheduler uses to run an inference execution.

LatestScheduledRetrainingStatus.description: Indicates the status of the most recent scheduled retraining run.

LatestScheduledRetrainingModelVersion.description: Indicates the most recent model version that was generated by retraining.

LatestScheduledRetrainingStartTime.description: Indicates the start time of the most recent scheduled retraining run.

NextScheduledRetrainingStartDate.description: Indicates the date that the next scheduled retraining run will start on. Lookout for Equipment truncates the time you provide to the nearest UTC day.

RetrainingSchedulerStatus.description: Indicates the status of the retraining scheduler.

ModelDiagnosticsOutputConfiguration.description: Output configuration information for the pointwise model diagnostics for an Amazon Lookout for Equipment model.

S3OutputConfiguration.description: The Amazon S3 location for the pointwise model diagnostics.

Bucket.description: The name of the Amazon S3 bucket where the pointwise model diagnostics are located. You must be the owner of the Amazon S3 bucket.

Prefix.description:
The Amazon S3 prefix for the location of the pointwise model diagnostics. The prefix specifies the folder and evaluation result file name. (bucket).

When you call CreateModel or UpdateModel, specify the path within the bucket that you want Lookout for Equipment to save the model to. During training, Lookout for Equipment creates the model evaluation model as a compressed JSON file with the name model_diagnostics_results.json.gz.

When you call DescribeModel or DescribeModelVersion, prefix contains the file path and filename of the model evaluation file.

KmsKeyId.description: The Amazon Web Services Key Management Service (KMS) key identifier to encrypt the pointwise model diagnostics files.

ModelQuality.description:
Provides a quality assessment for a model that uses labels. If Lookout for Equipment determines that the model quality is poor based on training metrics, the value is POOR_QUALITY_DETECTED. Otherwise, the value is QUALITY_THRESHOLD_MET.

If the model is unlabeled, the model quality can't be assessed and the value of ModelQuality is CANNOT_DETERMINE_QUALITY. In this situation, you can get a model quality assessment by adding labels to the input dataset and retraining the model.

For information about using labels with your models, see Understanding labeling.

For information about improving the quality of a model, see Best practices with Amazon Lookout for Equipment.

RetrainingSchedulerSummaries.description: Provides information on the specified retraining scheduler, including the model name, model ARN, status, and start date.

NextToken.description: If the number of results exceeds the maximum, this pagination token is returned. Use this token in the request to show the next page of retraining schedulers.

ModelName.description: The name of the model that the retraining scheduler is attached to.

ModelArn.description: The ARN of the model that the retraining scheduler is attached to.

Status.description: The status of the retraining scheduler.

RetrainingStartDate.description: The start date for the retraining scheduler. Lookout for Equipment truncates the time you provide to the nearest UTC day.

RetrainingFrequency.description: The frequency at which the model retraining is set. This follows the ISO 8601 guidelines.

LookbackWindow.description: The number of past days of data used for retraining.

DatasetName.description: The name of the dataset being created.

DatasetArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the dataset being created.

Status.description: Indicates the status of the CreateDataset operation.

InferenceSchedulerArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the inference scheduler being created.

InferenceSchedulerName.description: The name of inference scheduler being created.

Status.description: Indicates the status of the CreateInferenceScheduler operation.

ModelQuality.description:
Provides a quality assessment for a model that uses labels. If Lookout for Equipment determines that the model quality is poor based on training metrics, the value is POOR_QUALITY_DETECTED. Otherwise, the value is QUALITY_THRESHOLD_MET.

If the model is unlabeled, the model quality can't be assessed and the value of ModelQuality is CANNOT_DETERMINE_QUALITY. In this situation, you can get a model quality assessment by adding labels to the input dataset and retraining the model.

For information about using labels with your models, see Understanding labeling.

For information about improving the quality of a model, see Best practices with Amazon Lookout for Equipment.

LabelId.description: The ID of the label that you have created.

LabelGroupName.description: The name of the label group that you have created. Data in this field will be retained for service usage. Follow best practices for the security of your data.

LabelGroupArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the label group that you have created.

ModelArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the model being created.

Status.description: Indicates the status of the CreateModel operation.

ModelName.description: The name of the model that you added the retraining scheduler to.

ModelArn.description: The ARN of the model that you added the retraining scheduler to.

Status.description: The status of the retraining scheduler.

JobId.description: Indicates the job ID of the data ingestion job.

DatasetArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the dataset being used in the data ingestion job.

IngestionInputConfiguration.description: Specifies the S3 location configuration for the data input for the data ingestion job.

RoleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of an IAM role with permission to access the data source being ingested.

CreatedAt.description: The time at which the data ingestion job was created.

Status.description: Indicates the status of the DataIngestionJob operation.

FailedReason.description: Specifies the reason for failure when a data ingestion job has failed.

DataQualitySummary.description: Gives statistics about a completed ingestion job. These statistics primarily relate to quantifying incorrect data such as MissingCompleteSensorData, MissingSensorData, UnsupportedDateFormats, InsufficientSensorData, and DuplicateTimeStamps.

IngestedFilesSummary.description: Gives statistics about how many files have been ingested, and which files have not been ingested, for a particular ingestion job.

StatusDetail.description: Provides details about status of the ingestion job that is currently in progress.

IngestedDataSize.description: Indicates the size of the ingested dataset.

DataStartTime.description: Indicates the earliest timestamp corresponding to data that was successfully ingested during this specific ingestion job.

DataEndTime.description: Indicates the latest timestamp corresponding to data that was successfully ingested during this specific ingestion job.

SourceDatasetArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the source dataset from which the data used for the data ingestion job was imported from.

S3InputConfiguration.description: The location information for the S3 bucket used for input data for the data ingestion.

Bucket.description: The name of the S3 bucket used for the input data for the data ingestion.

Prefix.description: The prefix for the S3 location being used for the input data for the data ingestion.

KeyPattern.description:
The pattern for matching the Amazon S3 files that will be used for ingestion. If the schema was created previously without any KeyPattern, then the default KeyPattern {prefix}/{component_name}/* is used to download files from Amazon S3 according to the schema. This field is required when ingestion is being done for the first time.

Valid Values: {prefix}/{component_name}_* | {prefix}/{component_name}/* | {prefix}/{component_name}[DELIMITER]* (Allowed delimiters : space, dot, underscore, hyphen)

DatasetName.description: The name of the dataset being described.

DatasetArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the dataset being described.

CreatedAt.description: Specifies the time the dataset was created in Lookout for Equipment.

LastUpdatedAt.description: Specifies the time the dataset was last updated, if it was.

Status.description: Indicates the status of the dataset.

Schema.description: A JSON description of the data that is in each time series dataset, including names, column names, and data types.

ServerSideKmsKeyId.description: Provides the identifier of the KMS key used to encrypt dataset data by Amazon Lookout for Equipment.

IngestionInputConfiguration.description: Specifies the S3 location configuration for the data input for the data ingestion job.

DataQualitySummary.description: Gives statistics associated with the given dataset for the latest successful associated ingestion job id. These statistics primarily relate to quantifying incorrect data such as MissingCompleteSensorData, MissingSensorData, UnsupportedDateFormats, InsufficientSensorData, and DuplicateTimeStamps.

IngestedFilesSummary.description: IngestedFilesSummary associated with the given dataset for the latest successful associated ingestion job id.

RoleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the IAM role that you are using for this the data ingestion job.

DataStartTime.description: Indicates the earliest timestamp corresponding to data that was successfully ingested during the most recent ingestion of this particular dataset.

DataEndTime.description: Indicates the latest timestamp corresponding to data that was successfully ingested during the most recent ingestion of this particular dataset.

SourceDatasetArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the source dataset from which the current data being described was imported from.

S3InputConfiguration.description: The location information for the S3 bucket used for input data for the data ingestion.

Bucket.description: The name of the S3 bucket used for the input data for the data ingestion.

Prefix.description: The prefix for the S3 location being used for the input data for the data ingestion.

KeyPattern.description:
The pattern for matching the Amazon S3 files that will be used for ingestion. If the schema was created previously without any KeyPattern, then the default KeyPattern {prefix}/{component_name}/* is used to download files from Amazon S3 according to the schema. This field is required when ingestion is being done for the first time.

Valid Values: {prefix}/{component_name}_* | {prefix}/{component_name}/* | {prefix}/{component_name}[DELIMITER]* (Allowed delimiters : space, dot, underscore, hyphen)

ModelArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the machine learning model of the inference scheduler being described.

ModelName.description: The name of the machine learning model of the inference scheduler being described.

InferenceSchedulerName.description: The name of the inference scheduler being described.

InferenceSchedulerArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the inference scheduler being described.

Status.description: Indicates the status of the inference scheduler.

DataDelayOffsetInMinutes.description: A period of time (in minutes) by which inference on the data is delayed after the data starts. For instance, if you select an offset delay time of five minutes, inference will not begin on the data until the first data measurement after the five minute mark. For example, if five minutes is selected, the inference scheduler will wake up at the configured frequency with the additional five minute delay time to check the customer S3 bucket. The customer can upload data at the same frequency and they don't need to stop and restart the scheduler when uploading new data.

DataUploadFrequency.description: Specifies how often data is uploaded to the source S3 bucket for the input data. This value is the length of time between data uploads. For instance, if you select 5 minutes, Amazon Lookout for Equipment will upload the real-time data to the source bucket once every 5 minutes. This frequency also determines how often Amazon Lookout for Equipment starts a scheduled inference on your data. In this example, it starts once every 5 minutes.

CreatedAt.description: Specifies the time at which the inference scheduler was created.

UpdatedAt.description: Specifies the time at which the inference scheduler was last updated, if it was.

DataInputConfiguration.description: Specifies configuration information for the input data for the inference scheduler, including delimiter, format, and dataset location.

DataOutputConfiguration.description: Specifies information for the output results for the inference scheduler, including the output S3 location.

RoleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of a role with permission to access the data source for the inference scheduler being described.

ServerSideKmsKeyId.description: Provides the identifier of the KMS key used to encrypt inference scheduler data by Amazon Lookout for Equipment.

LatestInferenceResult.description: Indicates whether the latest execution for the inference scheduler was Anomalous (anomalous events found) or Normal (no anomalous events found).

S3InputConfiguration.description: Specifies configuration information for the input data for the inference, including Amazon S3 location of input data.

Bucket.description: The bucket containing the input dataset for the inference.

Prefix.description: The prefix for the S3 bucket used for the input data for the inference.

InputTimeZoneOffset.description: Indicates the difference between your time zone and Coordinated Universal Time (UTC).

InferenceInputNameConfiguration.description: Specifies configuration information for the input data for the inference, including timestamp format and delimiter.

TimestampFormat.description: The format of the timestamp, whether Epoch time, or standard, with or without hyphens (-).

ComponentTimestampDelimiter.description: Indicates the delimiter character used between items in the data.

LabelGroupName.description: The name of the requested label group.

LabelGroupArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the requested label group.

LabelId.description: The ID of the requested label.

StartTime.description: The start time of the requested label.

EndTime.description: The end time of the requested label.

Rating.description: Indicates whether a labeled event represents an anomaly.

FaultCode.description:
Indicates the type of anomaly associated with the label.

Data in this field will be retained for service usage. Follow best practices for the security of your data.

Notes.description:
Metadata providing additional information about the label.

Data in this field will be retained for service usage. Follow best practices for the security of your data.

Equipment.description: Indicates that a label pertains to a particular piece of equipment.

CreatedAt.description: The time at which the label was created.

LabelGroupName.description: The name of the label group.

LabelGroupArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the label group.

FaultCodes.description: Codes indicating the type of anomaly associated with the labels in the lagbel group.

CreatedAt.description: The time at which the label group was created.

UpdatedAt.description: The time at which the label group was updated.

ModelName.description: The name of the machine learning model being described.

ModelArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the machine learning model being described.

DatasetName.description: The name of the dataset being used by the machine learning being described.

DatasetArn.description: The Amazon Resouce Name (ARN) of the dataset used to create the machine learning model being described.

Schema.description: A JSON description of the data that is in each time series dataset, including names, column names, and data types.

LabelsInputConfiguration.description: Specifies configuration information about the labels input, including its S3 location.

TrainingDataStartTime.description: Indicates the time reference in the dataset that was used to begin the subset of training data for the machine learning model.

TrainingDataEndTime.description: Indicates the time reference in the dataset that was used to end the subset of training data for the machine learning model.

EvaluationDataStartTime.description: Indicates the time reference in the dataset that was used to begin the subset of evaluation data for the machine learning model.

EvaluationDataEndTime.description: Indicates the time reference in the dataset that was used to end the subset of evaluation data for the machine learning model.

RoleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of a role with permission to access the data source for the machine learning model being described.

DataPreProcessingConfiguration.description:
The configuration is the TargetSamplingRate, which is the sampling rate of the data after post processing by Amazon Lookout for Equipment. For example, if you provide data that has been collected at a 1 second level and you want the system to resample the data at a 1 minute rate before training, the TargetSamplingRate is 1 minute.

When providing a value for the TargetSamplingRate, you must attach the prefix "PT" to the rate you want. The value for a 1 second rate is therefore PT1S, the value for a 15 minute rate is PT15M, and the value for a 1 hour rate is PT1H

Status.description: Specifies the current status of the model being described. Status describes the status of the most recent action of the model.

TrainingExecutionStartTime.description: Indicates the time at which the training of the machine learning model began.

TrainingExecutionEndTime.description: Indicates the time at which the training of the machine learning model was completed.

FailedReason.description: If the training of the machine learning model failed, this indicates the reason for that failure.

ModelMetrics.description: The Model Metrics show an aggregated summary of the model's performance within the evaluation time range. This is the JSON content of the metrics created when evaluating the model.

LastUpdatedTime.description: Indicates the last time the machine learning model was updated. The type of update is not specified.

CreatedAt.description: Indicates the time and date at which the machine learning model was created.

ServerSideKmsKeyId.description: Provides the identifier of the KMS key used to encrypt model data by Amazon Lookout for Equipment.

OffCondition.description: Indicates that the asset associated with this sensor has been shut off. As long as this condition is met, Lookout for Equipment will not use data from this asset for training, evaluation, or inference.

SourceModelVersionArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the source model version. This field appears if the active model version was imported.

ImportJobStartTime.description: The date and time when the import job was started. This field appears if the active model version was imported.

ImportJobEndTime.description: The date and time when the import job was completed. This field appears if the active model version was imported.

ActiveModelVersion.description: The name of the model version used by the inference schedular when running a scheduled inference execution.

ActiveModelVersionArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the model version used by the inference scheduler when running a scheduled inference execution.

ModelVersionActivatedAt.description: The date the active model version was activated.

PreviousActiveModelVersion.description: The model version that was set as the active model version prior to the current active model version.

PreviousActiveModelVersionArn.description: The ARN of the model version that was set as the active model version prior to the current active model version.

PreviousModelVersionActivatedAt.description: The date and time when the previous active model version was activated.

PriorModelMetrics.description: If the model version was retrained, this field shows a summary of the performance of the prior model on the new training range. You can use the information in this JSON-formatted object to compare the new model version and the prior model version.

LatestScheduledRetrainingFailedReason.description: If the model version was generated by retraining and the training failed, this indicates the reason for that failure.

LatestScheduledRetrainingStatus.description: Indicates the status of the most recent scheduled retraining run.

LatestScheduledRetrainingModelVersion.description: Indicates the most recent model version that was generated by retraining.

LatestScheduledRetrainingStartTime.description: Indicates the start time of the most recent scheduled retraining run.

LatestScheduledRetrainingAvailableDataIn.description: Indicates the number of days of data used in the most recent scheduled retraining run.

NextScheduledRetrainingStartDate.description: Indicates the date and time that the next scheduled retraining run will start on. Lookout for Equipment truncates the time you provide to the nearest UTC day.

AccumulatedInferenceDataStartTime.description: Indicates the start time of the inference data that has been accumulated.

AccumulatedInferenceDataEndTime.description: Indicates the end time of the inference data that has been accumulated.

RetrainingSchedulerStatus.description: Indicates the status of the retraining scheduler.

ModelDiagnosticsOutputConfiguration.description: Configuration information for the model's pointwise model diagnostics.

ModelQuality.description:
Provides a quality assessment for a model that uses labels. If Lookout for Equipment determines that the model quality is poor based on training metrics, the value is POOR_QUALITY_DETECTED. Otherwise, the value is QUALITY_THRESHOLD_MET.

If the model is unlabeled, the model quality can't be assessed and the value of ModelQuality is CANNOT_DETERMINE_QUALITY. In this situation, you can get a model quality assessment by adding labels to the input dataset and retraining the model.

For information about using labels with your models, see Understanding labeling.

For information about improving the quality of a model, see Best practices with Amazon Lookout for Equipment.

S3InputConfiguration.description: Contains location information for the S3 location being used for label data.

Bucket.description: The name of the S3 bucket holding the label data.

Prefix.description: The prefix for the S3 bucket used for the label data.

LabelGroupName.description: The name of the label group to be used for label data.

ModelName.description: The name of the machine learning model that this version belongs to.

ModelArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the parent machine learning model that this version belong to.

ModelVersion.description: The version of the machine learning model.

ModelVersionArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the model version.

Status.description: The current status of the model version.

SourceType.description: Indicates whether this model version was created by training or by importing.

DatasetName.description: The name of the dataset used to train the model version.

DatasetArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the dataset used to train the model version.

Schema.description: The schema of the data used to train the model version.

LabelsInputConfiguration.description: Contains the configuration information for the S3 location being used to hold label data.

TrainingDataStartTime.description: The date on which the training data began being gathered. If you imported the version, this is the date that the training data in the source version began being gathered.

TrainingDataEndTime.description: The date on which the training data finished being gathered. If you imported the version, this is the date that the training data in the source version finished being gathered.

EvaluationDataStartTime.description: The date on which the data in the evaluation set began being gathered. If you imported the version, this is the date that the evaluation set data in the source version began being gathered.

EvaluationDataEndTime.description: The date on which the data in the evaluation set began being gathered. If you imported the version, this is the date that the evaluation set data in the source version finished being gathered.

RoleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the role that was used to train the model version.

DataPreProcessingConfiguration.description:
The configuration is the TargetSamplingRate, which is the sampling rate of the data after post processing by Amazon Lookout for Equipment. For example, if you provide data that has been collected at a 1 second level and you want the system to resample the data at a 1 minute rate before training, the TargetSamplingRate is 1 minute.

When providing a value for the TargetSamplingRate, you must attach the prefix "PT" to the rate you want. The value for a 1 second rate is therefore PT1S, the value for a 15 minute rate is PT15M, and the value for a 1 hour rate is PT1H

TrainingExecutionStartTime.description: The time when the training of the version began.

TrainingExecutionEndTime.description: The time when the training of the version completed.

FailedReason.description: The failure message if the training of the model version failed.

ModelMetrics.description: Shows an aggregated summary, in JSON format, of the model's performance within the evaluation time range. These metrics are created when evaluating the model.

LastUpdatedTime.description: Indicates the last time the machine learning model version was updated.

CreatedAt.description: Indicates the time and date at which the machine learning model version was created.

ServerSideKmsKeyId.description: The identifier of the KMS key key used to encrypt model version data by Amazon Lookout for Equipment.

OffCondition.description: Indicates that the asset associated with this sensor has been shut off. As long as this condition is met, Lookout for Equipment will not use data from this asset for training, evaluation, or inference.

SourceModelVersionArn.description: If model version was imported, then this field is the arn of the source model version.

ImportJobStartTime.description: The date and time when the import job began. This field appears if the model version was imported.

ImportJobEndTime.description: The date and time when the import job completed. This field appears if the model version was imported.

ImportedDataSizeInBytes.description: The size in bytes of the imported data. This field appears if the model version was imported.

PriorModelMetrics.description: If the model version was retrained, this field shows a summary of the performance of the prior model on the new training range. You can use the information in this JSON-formatted object to compare the new model version and the prior model version.

RetrainingAvailableDataInDays.description: Indicates the number of days of data used in the most recent scheduled retraining run.

AutoPromotionResult.description: Indicates whether the model version was promoted to be the active version after retraining or if there was an error with or cancellation of the retraining.

AutoPromotionResultReason.description: Indicates the reason for the AutoPromotionResult. For example, a model might not be promoted if its performance was worse than the active version, if there was an error during training, or if the retraining scheduler was using MANUAL promote mode. The model will be promoted in MANAGED promote mode if the performance is better than the previous model.

ModelDiagnosticsOutputConfiguration.description: The Amazon S3 location where Amazon Lookout for Equipment saves the pointwise model diagnostics for the model version.

ModelDiagnosticsResultsObject.description: The Amazon S3 output prefix for where Lookout for Equipment saves the pointwise model diagnostics for the model version.

ModelQuality.description:
Provides a quality assessment for a model that uses labels. If Lookout for Equipment determines that the model quality is poor based on training metrics, the value is POOR_QUALITY_DETECTED. Otherwise, the value is QUALITY_THRESHOLD_MET.

If the model is unlabeled, the model quality can't be assessed and the value of ModelQuality is CANNOT_DETERMINE_QUALITY. In this situation, you can get a model quality assessment by adding labels to the input dataset and retraining the model.

For information about using labels with your models, see Understanding labeling.

For information about improving the quality of a model, see Best practices with Amazon Lookout for Equipment.

S3InputConfiguration.description: Contains location information for the S3 location being used for label data.

Bucket.description: The name of the S3 bucket holding the label data.

Prefix.description: The prefix for the S3 bucket used for the label data.

LabelGroupName.description: The name of the label group to be used for label data.

PolicyRevisionId.description: A unique identifier for a revision of the resource policy.

ResourcePolicy.description: The resource policy in a JSON-formatted string.

CreationTime.description: The time when the resource policy was created.

LastModifiedTime.description: The time when the resource policy was last modified.

ModelName.description: The name of the model that the retraining scheduler is attached to.

ModelArn.description: The ARN of the model that the retraining scheduler is attached to.

RetrainingStartDate.description: The start date for the retraining scheduler. Lookout for Equipment truncates the time you provide to the nearest UTC day.

RetrainingFrequency.description: The frequency at which the model retraining is set. This follows the ISO 8601 guidelines.

LookbackWindow.description: The number of past days of data used for retraining.

Status.description: The status of the retraining scheduler.

PromoteMode.description: Indicates how the service uses new models. In MANAGED mode, new models are used for inference if they have better performance than the current model. In MANUAL mode, the new models are not used until they are manually activated.

CreatedAt.description: Indicates the time and date at which the retraining scheduler was created.

UpdatedAt.description: Indicates the time and date at which the retraining scheduler was updated.

DatasetName.description: The name of the created machine learning dataset.

DatasetArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the dataset that was imported.

Status.description: The status of the ImportDataset operation.

JobId.description: A unique identifier for the job of importing the dataset.

ModelName.description: The name for the machine learning model.

ModelArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the model being created.

ModelVersionArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the model version being created.

ModelVersion.description: The version of the model being created.

Status.description: The status of the ImportModelVersion operation.

NextToken.description: An opaque pagination token indicating where to continue the listing of inference executions.

InferenceEventSummaries.description: Provides an array of information about the individual inference events returned from the ListInferenceEvents operation, including scheduler used, event start time, event end time, diagnostics, and so on.

InferenceSchedulerArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the inference scheduler being used for the inference event.

InferenceSchedulerName.description: The name of the inference scheduler being used for the inference events.

EventStartTime.description: Indicates the starting time of an inference event.

EventEndTime.description: Indicates the ending time of an inference event.

Diagnostics.description: An array which specifies the names and values of all sensors contributing to an inference event.

EventDurationInSeconds.description: Indicates the size of an inference event in seconds.

NextToken.description: An opaque pagination token indicating where to continue the listing of inference executions.

InferenceExecutionSummaries.description:
Provides an array of information about the individual inference executions returned from the ListInferenceExecutions operation, including model used, inference scheduler, data configuration, and so on.

If you don't supply the InferenceSchedulerName request parameter, or if you supply the name of an inference scheduler that doesn't exist, ListInferenceExecutions returns an empty array in InferenceExecutionSummaries.

ModelName.description: The name of the machine learning model being used for the inference execution.

ModelArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the machine learning model used for the inference execution.

InferenceSchedulerName.description: The name of the inference scheduler being used for the inference execution.

InferenceSchedulerArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the inference scheduler being used for the inference execution.

ScheduledStartTime.description: Indicates the start time at which the inference scheduler began the specific inference execution.

DataStartTime.description: Indicates the time reference in the dataset at which the inference execution began.

DataEndTime.description: Indicates the time reference in the dataset at which the inference execution stopped.

DataInputConfiguration.description: Specifies configuration information for the input data for the inference scheduler, including delimiter, format, and dataset location.

S3InputConfiguration.description: Specifies configuration information for the input data for the inference, including Amazon S3 location of input data.

Bucket.description: The bucket containing the input dataset for the inference.

Prefix.description: The prefix for the S3 bucket used for the input data for the inference.

InputTimeZoneOffset.description: Indicates the difference between your time zone and Coordinated Universal Time (UTC).

InferenceInputNameConfiguration.description: Specifies configuration information for the input data for the inference, including timestamp format and delimiter.

TimestampFormat.description: The format of the timestamp, whether Epoch time, or standard, with or without hyphens (-).

ComponentTimestampDelimiter.description: Indicates the delimiter character used between items in the data.

DataOutputConfiguration.description: Specifies configuration information for the output results from for the inference execution, including the output Amazon S3 location.

S3OutputConfiguration.description: Specifies configuration information for the output results from for the inference, output S3 location.

Bucket.description: The bucket containing the output results from the inference

Prefix.description: The prefix for the S3 bucket used for the output results from the inference.

KmsKeyId.description: The ID number for the KMS key key used to encrypt the inference output.

CustomerResultObject.description: The S3 object that the inference execution results were uploaded to.

Bucket.description: The name of the specific S3 bucket.

Key.description: The Amazon Web Services Key Management Service (KMS key) key being used to encrypt the S3 object. Without this key, data in the bucket is not accessible.

Status.description: Indicates the status of the inference execution.

FailedReason.description: Specifies the reason for failure when an inference execution has failed.

ModelVersion.description: The model version used for the inference execution.

ModelVersionArn.description: The Amazon Resource Number (ARN) of the model version used for the inference execution.

NextToken.description: An opaque pagination token indicating where to continue the listing of datasets.

LabelSummaries.description:
A summary of the items in the label group.

If you don't supply the LabelGroupName request parameter, or if you supply the name of a label group that doesn't exist, ListLabels returns an empty array in LabelSummaries.

LabelGroupName.description: The name of the label group.

LabelGroupArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the label group.

StartTime.description: The timestamp indicating the start of the label.

EndTime.description: The timestamp indicating the end of the label.

Rating.description: Indicates whether a labeled event represents an anomaly.

FaultCode.description:
Indicates the type of anomaly associated with the label.

Data in this field will be retained for service usage. Follow best practices for the security of your data.

Equipment.description: Indicates that a label pertains to a particular piece of equipment.

CreatedAt.description: The time at which the label was created.

NextToken.description: If the total number of results exceeds the limit that the response can display, the response returns an opaque pagination token indicating where to continue the listing of machine learning model versions. Use this token in the NextToken field in the request to list the next page of results.

ModelVersionSummaries.description:
Provides information on the specified model version, including the created time, model and dataset ARNs, and status.

If you don't supply the ModelName request parameter, or if you supply the name of a model that doesn't exist, ListModelVersions returns an empty array in ModelVersionSummaries.

ModelName.description: The name of the model that this model version is a version of.

ModelArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the model that this model version is a version of.

ModelVersionArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the model version.

CreatedAt.description: The time when this model version was created.

Status.description: The current status of the model version.

SourceType.description: Indicates how this model version was generated.

ModelQuality.description:
Provides a quality assessment for a model that uses labels. If Lookout for Equipment determines that the model quality is poor based on training metrics, the value is POOR_QUALITY_DETECTED. Otherwise, the value is QUALITY_THRESHOLD_MET.

If the model is unlabeled, the model quality can't be assessed and the value of ModelQuality is CANNOT_DETERMINE_QUALITY. In this situation, you can get a model quality assessment by adding labels to the input dataset and retraining the model.

For information about improving the quality of a model, see Best practices with Amazon Lookout for Equipment.

SensorStatisticsSummaries.description: Provides ingestion-based statistics regarding the specified sensor with respect to various validation types, such as whether data exists, the number and percentage of missing values, and the number and percentage of duplicate timestamps.

NextToken.description: An opaque pagination token indicating where to continue the listing of sensor statistics.

ComponentName.description: Name of the component to which the particular sensor belongs for which the statistics belong to.

SensorName.description: Name of the sensor that the statistics belong to.

DataExists.description: Parameter that indicates whether data exists for the sensor that the statistics belong to.

MissingValues.description: Parameter that describes the total number of, and percentage of, values that are missing for the sensor that the statistics belong to.

Count.description: Indicates the count of occurences of the given statistic.

Percentage.description: Indicates the percentage of occurances of the given statistic.

InvalidValues.description: Parameter that describes the total number of, and percentage of, values that are invalid for the sensor that the statistics belong to.

Count.description: Indicates the count of occurences of the given statistic.

Percentage.description: Indicates the percentage of occurances of the given statistic.

InvalidDateEntries.description: Parameter that describes the total number of invalid date entries associated with the sensor that the statistics belong to.

Count.description: Indicates the count of occurences of the given statistic.

Percentage.description: Indicates the percentage of occurances of the given statistic.

DuplicateTimestamps.description: Parameter that describes the total number of duplicate timestamp records associated with the sensor that the statistics belong to.

Count.description: Indicates the count of occurences of the given statistic.

Percentage.description: Indicates the percentage of occurances of the given statistic.

CategoricalValues.description: Parameter that describes potential risk about whether data associated with the sensor is categorical.

Status.description: Indicates whether there is a potential data issue related to categorical values.

NumberOfCategory.description: Indicates the number of categories in the data.

MultipleOperatingModes.description: Parameter that describes potential risk about whether data associated with the sensor has more than one operating mode.

Status.description: Indicates whether there is a potential data issue related to having multiple operating modes.

LargeTimestampGaps.description: Parameter that describes potential risk about whether data associated with the sensor contains one or more large gaps between consecutive timestamps.

Status.description: Indicates whether there is a potential data issue related to large gaps in timestamps.

NumberOfLargeTimestampGaps.description: Indicates the number of large timestamp gaps, if there are any.

MaxTimestampGapInDays.description: Indicates the size of the largest timestamp gap, in days.

MonotonicValues.description: Parameter that describes potential risk about whether data associated with the sensor is mostly monotonic.

Status.description: Indicates whether there is a potential data issue related to having monotonic values.

Monotonicity.description: Indicates the monotonicity of values. Can be INCREASING, DECREASING, or STATIC.

DataStartTime.description: Indicates the time reference to indicate the beginning of valid data associated with the sensor that the statistics belong to.

DataEndTime.description: Indicates the time reference to indicate the end of valid data associated with the sensor that the statistics belong to.

Tags.description: Any tags associated with the resource.

ResourceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the resource for which the policy was created.

PolicyRevisionId.description: A unique identifier for a revision of the resource policy.

JobId.description: Indicates the job ID of the data ingestion job.

Status.description: Indicates the status of the StartDataIngestionJob operation.

ModelArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the machine learning model being used by the inference scheduler.

ModelName.description: The name of the machine learning model being used by the inference scheduler.

InferenceSchedulerName.description: The name of the inference scheduler being started.

InferenceSchedulerArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the inference scheduler being started.

Status.description: Indicates the status of the inference scheduler.

ModelName.description: The name of the model whose retraining scheduler is being started.

ModelArn.description: The ARN of the model whose retraining scheduler is being started.

Status.description: The status of the retraining scheduler.

ModelArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the machine learning model used by the inference scheduler being stopped.

ModelName.description: The name of the machine learning model used by the inference scheduler being stopped.

InferenceSchedulerName.description: The name of the inference scheduler being stopped.

InferenceSchedulerArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the inference schedule being stopped.

Status.description: Indicates the status of the inference scheduler.

ModelName.description: The name of the model whose retraining scheduler is being stopped.

ModelArn.description: The ARN of the model whose retraining scheduler is being stopped.

Status.description: The status of the retraining scheduler.

ModelName.description: The name of the machine learning model for which the active model version was set.

ModelArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the machine learning model for which the active model version was set.

CurrentActiveVersion.description: The version that is currently active of the machine learning model for which the active model version was set.

PreviousActiveVersion.description: The previous version that was active of the machine learning model for which the active model version was set.

CurrentActiveVersionArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the machine learning model version that is the current active model version.

PreviousActiveVersionArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the machine learning model version that was the previous active model version.
